prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含2021-2023理科）最低位次约8920→9289→7780→15163→14892，2024年因贵州首年新高考（文理分科改物理类/历史类）出现大幅后移，2025 年小幅回升至14892名，近两年基准约15000名附近；2021–2025年物理类计划数分别为176→178→162→165→140人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划126人，较2 025年再缩减14人（-10%），缩招幅度明显，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第46名，近年排名稳定在40–46区间，属于中上 层次211；2024年声誉偏正面（食堂改善），2026年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度排名第46（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中体育学A-、药学A-，共2个A-级学科；与招生专业关联较弱，对整体报考热度拉动有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、电子信息等 工科专业社会热度持续偏高；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约29.9万，按近年比例估算物理类约20.8万人，较2025年物理类20.7万人略有增加，竞争基数扩大。；苏州大学位于江苏苏州，属长三角经济发达地区，对西南省份考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在贵州招生规模中等，2026年物理类126人，属跨省招 生中偏大规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在2024年新高考后稳定在15000名附近、2026年计划大幅缩招（-10%）加剧竞争、本省物理类考生略有增加等因素，预计2026年最 低录取位次较2025年小幅前移（更难进）；预测最低位次约13968名，区间13468–14468名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including 2021-2023 Science) were approximately 8920 → 9289 → 7780 → 15163 → 14892. In 2024, due to Guizhou's first year of the new college entrance examination (changing from arts/science division to Physics/History categories), there was a significant drop. In 2025, it slightly recovered to 14892, with the baseline around 15000 in recent two years. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 176 → 178 → 162 → 165 → 140, showing a decreasing trend year by year. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 126, a reduction of 14 (-10%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it ranks 46th, with stable rankings in the 40-46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2024, its reputation was slightly positive (improved cafeteria), while in 2026, it was slightly negative (campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranks 46th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure and acceptable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has two A- level disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-, which are weakly related to the enrollment majors and have limited impact on overall application heat.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 208,000 in the Physics Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 207,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, part of the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces. Its enrollment scale in Guizhou is moderate, with 126 students in the Physics Category in 2026, considered a relatively large scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have stabilized around 15000 after the new college entrance examination in 2024, the significant enrollment reduction (-10%) in 2026 intensifies competition, and the slight increase in local Physics Category candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13968, with a range of 13468 to 14468.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit (around 14500), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors and be cautious with Tier 1 popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts from 2021-2023) was approximately 1364 → 1844 → 1738 → 4285 → 2119. In 2024, due to Guizhou's first year of the new college entrance exam, there was a significant drop (4285th place), but in 2025 it rebounded notably to 2119th place, showing large fluctuations. The recent two-year baseline is around 2100–2200. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 34 → 34 → 48 → 47 → 39, with a reduction to 39 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 44 students, an increase of 5 (+12.8%) compared to 2025, indicating a clear expansion and slightly eased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it is 46th, with recent rankings stable in the 40–46 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2024, its reputation was slightly positive (improved cafeteria), while in 2026 it was slightly negative (campus safety incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has two A- disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-. The History Category enrollment majors are mainly humanities and social sciences, which are weakly related to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) is stable. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Guizhou is about 299,000, with an estimated 90,600 in the History Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 90,100 in 2025, leading to a small expansion of the competition base. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has some regional appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces. Its enrollment scale in Guizhou for History Category is medium-to-small, with 44 students in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of historical rankings to 2119th in 2025, the planned enrollment expansion in 2026 (+12.8%) easing competition, and a slight increase in the number of History Category candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly drop (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2302, with a range of 1957–2647.
